sections.title: Welcome to Prime College
sections.content: Prime College is a leading provider of professional qualifications in the UK. We offer a wide range of nationally and internationally recognised qualifications in Business, Management, and Health & Social Care. Our courses are designed to help you advance your career and achieve your professional goals.

sections.title: Prime College's Delivery Standard
sections.content: Through ISO9001 and Investors In People, our teaching model means we deliver qualifications that ensure we maintain a high standard of employer and learner satisfaction.

items.title: Training Courses
items.description: From Level 1 up to Level 7, for learners that are starting their career or want to progress further into a leadership masters degree level.

items.title: Different Countries
items.description: Courses are delivered internationally, and also recognised internationally with accredited certification.

items.title: Completion Rate
items.description: To commit to every learner achieving their qualification.

items.title: Recognised Qualifications
items.description: All our qualifications are awarded by Ofqual-regulated awarding bodies including OTHM and QUALIFI.

items.title: Flexible Learning
items.description: Study at your own pace with our flexible online and blended learning options.

items.title: Expert Tutors
items.description: Learn from industry professionals with years of practical and academic experience.

items.title: Career Support
items.description: Get personalised career guidance and support throughout your learning journey.

sections.title: Our Qualifications
sections.content: We offer qualifications across three key areas: Business, Management, and Health & Social Care. Each programme is designed to equip you with practical skills and knowledge that employers value.

items.title: OTHM Qualifications
items.description: Ofqual-regulated qualifications recognised by employers and universities across the UK and internationally.

items.title: QUALIFI Qualifications
items.description: Nationally recognised awards, certificates, and diplomas for professional development.

items.title: University Progression
items.description: Our Level 7 diplomas can lead to MBA top-up programmes at UK universities.

items.title: International Recognition
items.description: Qualifications recognised by employers and institutions across the globe.

sections.title: Start Your Journey Today
sections.content: Whether you are looking to start a new career, advance in your current role, or gain specialist knowledge, Prime College has a qualification for you. Contact us today to discuss your options.

meta.title: Prime College – Professional Qualifications UK
meta.description: Leading provider of professional qualifications in Business, Management, and Health & Social Care in the UK.
